title: Customs Brokerage in Flux: Why Intelligent Document Automation Is Now Essential
summary: Industry Context: Why Customs Brokerage and Freight Forwarding Demand Intelligent Document Automation Market Growth Amid Increasing Complexity: The U.S. customs brokerage market is projected to reach $5.3 billion in 2025, while the global market is estimated to grow from $22-23 billion to over $32 billion by 2030 (7%+ CAGR). author: Shiv Ramamurthi
